englishDefinitions: (idiomatic) To attempt to ascertain a person's point of view, or the nature of a situation, by cautious and subtle means.
persianTranslation: (اصطلاحاً) کوشش برای تعیین نقطه نظر شخص یا ماهیت یک موقعیت با ابزارهای محتاطانه و ظریف.
examples: I think we should feel out your mom's thoughts about this before we decide anything.
